text: Applying User-Centered Design to an AI-Supported Digital Library
textPreview: Applying User-Centered Design to an AI-Supported Digital Library

text: A revised presentation focused on implementation, evaluation, and improvements across the full system life cycle.
textPreview: A revised presentation focused on implementation, evaluation, and improvements across the full system life cycle.

text: The project combines digital library functions with AI-assisted recommendations to improve book discovery.
textPreview: The project combines digital library functions with AI-assisted recommendations to improve book discovery.

text:
The AI Library App allows
users to browse books,
search by topic or author,
open book details, save
books, and use an AI
assistant for
recommendations.
textPreview: The AI Library App allows | users to browse books, | search by topic or author, | open book details, save | books, and use an AI | assistant for | recommendations.

text:
Users often struggle to find
the right book quickly when
they do not know the exact
title or need help
identifying
beginner-friendly resources.
textPreview: Users often struggle to find | the right book quickly when | they do not know the exact | title or need help | identifying | beginner-friendly resources.

text:
The main users are
university students who need
digital access to academic
books, references, and study
materials.
textPreview: The main users are | university students who need | digital access to academic | books, references, and study | materials.

text: Planning defined the scope, timeline, and technology choices needed for smooth implementation.
textPreview: Planning defined the scope, timeline, and technology choices needed for smooth implementation.

text:
Set scope,
features,
timeline, and
tools.
textPreview: Set scope, | features, | timeline, and | tools.

text:
Implementation
continued into
test and
deployment.
textPreview: Implementation | continued into | test and | deployment.

text: Survey findings and requirement analysis showed why AI support and clear book details were necessary.
textPreview: Survey findings and requirement analysis showed why AI support and clear book details were necessary.

role: metric panel: Core system functions identified
metric accent: Core system functions identified

text: Login, library, detail, save, profile, AI, activity
textPreview: Login, library, detail, save, profile, AI, activity

text: Wireframes and layout planning translated user needs into structured screens before development began.
textPreview: Wireframes and layout planning translated user needs into structured screens before development began.

text:
Wireframes were created for
the Library page, Book
Detail page, AI Assistant
page, and Profile page
before implementation
started.
textPreview: Wireframes were created for | the Library page, Book | Detail page, AI Assistant | page, and Profile page | before implementation | started.

text:
The design focused on clear
navigation, readable content
hierarchy, and a connected
user flow across the app.
textPreview: The design focused on clear | navigation, readable content | hierarchy, and a connected | user flow across the app.

text:
Early layout planning
reduced confusion during
coding and made later
testing more consistent.
textPreview: Early layout planning | reduced confusion during | coding and made later | testing more consistent.

text: Design Outputs: Library and Book Detail
textPreview: Design Outputs: Library and Book Detail

text: These pages were designed to support browsing, filtering, book evaluation, and continued discovery.
textPreview: These pages were designed to support browsing, filtering, book evaluation, and continued discovery.

text:
The Library page was
designed as the main entry
point with search, category
filters, sorting, and save
actions.
textPreview: The Library page was | designed as the main entry | point with search, category | filters, sorting, and save | actions.

text:
The Book Detail page was
designed to show complete
metadata, file availability,
and stronger decision-making
support.
textPreview: The Book Detail page was | designed to show complete | metadata, file availability, | and stronger decision-making | support.

text:
Related books were added to
help users continue
exploring once they found a
relevant title.
textPreview: Related books were added to | help users continue | exploring once they found a | relevant title.

text: Design Outputs: AI, Profile, and UML Models
textPreview: Design Outputs: AI, Profile, and UML Models

text: The AI assistant, profile features, and system diagrams clarified interaction, workflow, and architecture.
textPreview: The AI assistant, profile features, and system diagrams clarified interaction, workflow, and architecture.

text:
The AI page was designed for
natural-language
recommendation queries
grounded in the real
catalog.
textPreview: The AI page was designed for | natural-language | recommendation queries | grounded in the real | catalog.

text:
The Profile page was
designed to show saved books
and recent activity so users
could return to previous
actions.
textPreview: The Profile page was | designed to show saved books | and recent activity so users | could return to previous | actions.

text:
Use case and activity
diagrams supported analysis,
while sequence and component
diagrams supported system
design and implementation.
textPreview: Use case and activity | diagrams supported analysis, | while sequence and component | diagrams supported system | design and implementation.

text: Development converted the design into a working full-stack application with AI-assisted recommendation logic.
textPreview: Development converted the design into a working full-stack application with AI-assisted recommendation logic.

text:
The frontend was developed
with React, TypeScript, and
Vite to provide routing,
theming, and responsive page
layouts.
textPreview: The frontend was developed | with React, TypeScript, and | Vite to provide routing, | theming, and responsive page | layouts.

text:
The backend used Node.js and
Express to process AI
requests, retrieve books
from Supabase, and send
context to Gemini.
textPreview: The backend used Node.js and | Express to process AI | requests, retrieve books | from Supabase, and send | context to Gemini.

text:
A key challenge was
preventing the AI from
acting like a general
chatbot. This was solved by
grounding responses in real
catalog data.
textPreview: A key challenge was | preventing the AI from | acting like a general | chatbot. This was solved by | grounding responses in real | catalog data.

text: Functional testing verified whether the main user flows were stable enough for deployment.
textPreview: Functional testing verified whether the main user flows were stable enough for deployment.

text: Selected book is saved to profile
textPreview: Selected book is saved to profile

text: Deployment moved the project from a local build to a usable online system with live configuration.
textPreview: Deployment moved the project from a local build to a usable online system with live configuration.

text:
The frontend was prepared
for deployment with Vercel
so the interface could be
accessed outside the
development environment.
textPreview: The frontend was prepared | for deployment with Vercel | so the interface could be | accessed outside the | development environment.

text:
The backend was prepared for
Render while Supabase
remained responsible for
authentication and database
services.
textPreview: The backend was prepared for | Render while Supabase | remained responsible for | authentication and database | services.

text:
The main challenge was
configuring environment
variables correctly for
Supabase and Gemini API
connections.
textPreview: The main challenge was | configuring environment | variables correctly for | Supabase and Gemini API | connections.

text: Post-implementation maintenance improved clarity, reliability, and consistency across the system.
textPreview: Post-implementation maintenance improved clarity, reliability, and consistency across the system.

text:
Recommendation logic and
prompt structure were
refined so responses became
more focused and easier to
understand.
textPreview: Recommendation logic and | prompt structure were | refined so responses became | more focused and easier to | understand.

text:
Saved books and recent
activity were improved so
the system behaved more
consistently across Library,
Profile, and Detail flows.
textPreview: Saved books and recent | activity were improved so | the system behaved more | consistently across Library, | Profile, and Detail flows.

text:
Theme behavior, chat input
behavior, and page
consistency were adjusted to
create a smoother user
experience.
textPreview: Theme behavior, chat input | behavior, and page | consistency were adjusted to | create a smoother user | experience.

text: Usability testing identified the AI assistant and Book Detail Page as the main areas needing improvement.
textPreview: Usability testing identified the AI assistant and Book Detail Page as the main areas needing improvement.

text:
The feedback led to stronger
recommendation ranking, simpler AI
language, and clearer Book Detail
presentation after testing.
textPreview: The feedback led to stronger | recommendation ranking, simpler AI | language, and clearer Book Detail | presentation after testing.

text: User-centered design guided the project from early planning through post-test improvement.
textPreview: User-centered design guided the project from early planning through post-test improvement.

text: The project was managed through the course-week structure, which supported steady implementation progress.
textPreview: The project was managed through the course-week structure, which supported steady implementation progress.

text:
Built features
and configured
the live system.
textPreview: Built features | and configured | the live system.

text:
Resolved issues
and used
usability
feedback.
textPreview: Resolved issues | and used | usability | feedback.

text:
Applied UCD
lessons and
project-management
review.
textPreview: Applied UCD | lessons and | project-management | review.

text: The final system demonstrates how user-centered implementation can make a digital library more useful and more understandable.
textPreview: The final system demonstrates how user-centered implementation can make a digital library more useful and more understandable.

text:
The AI Library App
successfully combined
library browsing, detailed
book information, saved
features, and AI-assisted
recommendations.
textPreview: The AI Library App | successfully combined | library browsing, detailed | book information, saved | features, and AI-assisted | recommendations.

text:
Usability-based improvements
made the system clearer,
more connected, and more
practical for real users.
textPreview: Usability-based improvements | made the system clearer, | more connected, and more | practical for real users.

text:
Future development can focus
on stronger AI
recommendation quality,
PDF-based book
understanding, and further
usability refinement.
textPreview: Future development can focus | on stronger AI | recommendation quality, | PDF-based book | understanding, and further | usability refinement.
